allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=20 vps-Ensotek 'echo "=== whoami ==="; whoami; echo "=== /var/www/Ensotek ==="; ls -la /var/www/Ensotek/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=== home ==="; ls -la ~ 2>/dev/null | head -30; echo "=== pm2 ==="; pm2 list 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=20 vps-Ensotek 'export PM2_HOME=/root/.pm2; echo "=== PM2 \(script paths\) ==="; pm2 jlist 2>/dev/null | node -e "let d=\\"\\";process.stdin.on\(\\"data\\",c=>d+=c\).on\(\\"end\\",\(\)=>{try{JSON.parse\(d\).forEach\(p=>console.log\(p.name,\\"|\\",p.pm2_env.status,\\"|cwd:\\",p.pm2_env.pm_cwd,\\"|script:\\",p.pm2_env.pm_exec_path\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(\\"parse-fail\\"\)}}\)}" 2>/dev/null *)

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=20 vps-Ensotek 'pm2 list 2>&1; echo "=== ecosystem configs ==="; echo "--- kompozit_backend ---"; cat /var/www/Ensotek/kompozit_backend/ecosystem.config.cjs 2>/dev/null; echo "--- kompozit/backend source ecosystem ---"; cat /var/www/Ensotek/kompozit/backend/ecosystem.config.cjs 2>/dev/null')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'echo "=== bellek ==="; free -h | head -2 *)
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'for p in kompozit-admin-panel kompozit-frontend; do *)
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'echo "=== swap + mem ==="; free -h; echo "=== disk ==="; df -h /var/www | tail -1 *)
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/kompozit/admin_panel && NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=2048" bun run build 2>&1 | tail -20')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'pm2 restart kompozit-admin-panel --update-env 2>&1 | grep -E "kompozit-admin" | head -2 *)
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/kompozit/frontend && NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=2048" bun run build 2>&1 | tail -22')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'pm2 restart kompozit-frontend --update-env 2>&1 | grep -E "kompozit-frontend" | head -1 *)
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'echo "=== canli site \(redirect takipli\) ===" *)

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=25 vps-Ensotek 'echo "=== dist mail modulu ==="; ls /var/www/Ensotek/kompozit_backend/dist/modules/mail/ 2>/dev/null; ls /var/www/Ensotek/kompozit_backend/dist/modules/mail/mail/ 2>/dev/null *)
